message:
🌱 cert-manager: Add support for passwordless pkcs12 keystore (#1839)

* 🌱 Add cert-manager: Add support for passwordless pkcs12 keystore mission

* 🌱 Add cert-manager: Add support for passwordless pkcs12 keystore mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix cert-manager #6783 mission: remove wrong PR, fix resolution

Remove unrelated PR cert-manager/cert-manager#6657 (inline password
support) from both files. Fix resolution to describe passwordless
PKCS12 keystore support.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cert-manager-6783-add-support-for-passwordless-pkcs12-keystore",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cert-manager: Add support for passwordless pkcs12 keystore",
+    "description": "Add support for passwordless pkcs12 keystore. Requested by 34+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cert-manager deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your cert-manager version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nhelm list -n cert-manager 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working cert-manager installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cert-manager configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cert-manager configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nkubectl get configmap -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cert-manager\n```\nI would like to push cert manager generated certificate to azure keyvault using external secrets operator. We need to use the certificate in a Azure Application Gateway and it only accepts pkcs12 format."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add support for passwordless pkcs12 keystore",
+        "description": "cert-manager added support for passwordless PKCS12 keystores, allowing certificates to be exported without a password requirement. This is useful for applications that expect unencrypted PKCS12 bundles.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add support for passwordless pkcs12 keystore\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "cert-manager added support for passwordless PKCS12 keystores, allowing certificates to be exported without a password requirement. This is useful for applications that expect unencrypted PKCS12 bundles.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: cert-manager.io/v1\nkind: Certificate\nspec:\n  secretName: certificate\n  keystores:\n    pkcs12:\n      create: true\n      password: <REDACTED>\"            # This is the new field.\n    jks:\n      create: true\n      password: <REDACTED>\"            # This is the other new field."
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "cert-manager",
+      "graduated",
+      "security",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "cert-manager"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Secret"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/issues/6783",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager"
+    },
+    "reactions": 34,
+    "comments": 5,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with cert-manager installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:37:44.151Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}

Please describe.**\nI would like to push cert manager generated certificate to azure keyvault using external secrets operator."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add support for passwordless pkcs12 keystore",
+        "description": "cert-manager added support for passwordless PKCS12 keystores, allowing certificates to be exported without a password requirement. This is useful for applications that expect unencrypted PKCS12 bundles.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add support for passwordless pkcs12 keystore\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "cert-manager added support for passwordless PKCS12 keystores, allowing certificates to be exported without a password requirement. This is useful for applications that expect unencrypted PKCS12 bundles.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: cert-manager.io/v1\nkind: Certificate\nspec:\n  secretName: certificate\n  keystores:\n    pkcs12:\n      create: true\n      password: \"changeit\"            # This is the new field.\n    jks:\n      create: true\n      password: \"changeit\"            # This is the other new field."
+      ]
+    }
+  },
